text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The day of Inari One's debut is finally here. As for
the racer in question...

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: It's finally, finally here! Today's the first of a marathon full of fights!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Of course I am! Gettin' a good start's important,
no matter what ya do! Imagine my future if I
flubbed up now!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna give ya a sight to remember. We Edo
folk run with style!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: So, get yourself a front-row seat, Boss! My first fireworks show is gonna be huge!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: So, get yourself a front-row seat, Boss! My first fireworks show is gonna be huge!
